Benjamin Kasparian is a paleontologist of Armenian descent who has just split up with his wife Amanda. While trying to readjust to single life, Benjamin visits the doctor and is informed he's suffering from an unusual brain disease called Talbot's Syndrome, and he's not likely to live longer than five weeks. Benjamin is initially philosophical about his fate and decides to enjoy himself as much as he can in the time he has left - much to the disgust of Amanda, his best friend, his boss, and his new girlfriend, all of whom believe he should be taking the matter more seriously.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Still reeling from a mission briefing from the CIA, the contestants are thrown into a punishment for breaking protocol. It’s safe to say the contestants are having a sobering morning. However, the contestants are given a minor reprieve when Don assigns them to some stretch PT to give them a break before the ropes course gauntlet in the afternoon.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Matthew and James for a recap of Day 3, and let’s just say they’ll be staying away from crunches for the foreseeable future. Matthew also lets us in on his weakness that he’s hoping to work through in the upcoming days. From there, James goes into his background and the challenges he’s overcome to be able to rise up and test his limits.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The mission is still imminent, but something pressing came up.. some really cool guns! This course of fire includes an amazing rifle, a man down and an opportunity to go full-auto. Then, Crossfire lets the team try out a tactical bat that includes a 22LR Pistol and a window breaker spike. If that’s not enough to get the blood pumping, the contestants try out a silencer fit for the most secretive of missions and a John Wick shotgun. Buckle up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: From suppressors to a shotgun fresh off the movie set of John Wick 4, the contestants got spoiled this week with amazing tactical weapons. Chris and Cindy sit down with Genesis Arms to get the scoop on how the team is doing prior to the finale. Mark Baylis, Green Beret, also sits down with our hosts to talk about his invaluable nonprofit that is changing the lives of hundreds of American Veterans.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.desc: Bigoted Ike Daggett takes action when Ben gives an Indian and his wife land after the Indian saves his life.

programme.title: The Mill
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' neighbor Tom Edwards has lived as a paraplegic since an accident involving Ben Cartwright.

programme.title: Gods Gun-1976- Jack Palance
programme.desc: After a peaceful town is terrorized by a ruthless outlaw and his gang, a priest turns to a legendary gunslinger for help. As the violence escalates, the two men must confront the outlaws and restore justice to the frightened community

programme.title: Songs and Saddles (1938)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy becomes involved in a range dispute when a group of outlaws tries to force settlers off their land. Using his musical charm and sharpshooting skills, he works to protect the innocent and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Rider of the Law (1935)
programme.desc: A determined lawman takes on a gang of outlaws terrorizing a small town, working to uncover their scheme and restore order while risking his life to bring them to justice

programme.title: Judge Priest - 1934
programme.desc: In a small Southern town after the Civil War, a wise and folksy judge, played by Will Rogers, presides over local disputes with humor, compassion, and common sense. As he navigates courtroom cases and community tensions, he stands up for fairness and decency while bringing people together in a divided society.

programme.title: Rogue of the Range (1936
programme.desc: A drifter with a questionable past arrives in a troubled town and becomes involved in a conflict between local ranchers and a gang of outlaws, ultimately choosing to stand up for justice and clear his name

programme.title: Rock River Renegades 1942
programme.desc: In Rock River Renegades, the Range Busters roar back into action! When a dangerous gang stirs up trouble along Rock River, Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune saddle up to bring law and order to the frontier. With fast-paced gunfights, daring stunts, and Alibi’s trademark humor, this action-packed Western delivers all the thrills fans of the series love.

programme.title: Law Of Vengeance
programme.desc: A group of women take a martial arts class to punish a sadistic serial rapist who wears a hockey mask.

programme.title: Guns of Diablo
programme.desc: Wagon train scout Linc Murdock reminisces about his old feud with rancher Rance Macklin over pretty Maria during the time when Linc worked for the Macklin ranch.

programme.title: Django Defies Sartana 1970
programme.desc: In Django Defies Sartana, two of the West’s deadliest gunslingers clash in a storm of bullets and betrayal. When Django is framed for a ruthless robbery, Sartana rides in to bring him down—but both soon uncover a darker plot driving the violence. Torn between rivalry and reluctant alliance, the two face off against treachery, outlaws, and each other in a Spaghetti Western loaded with double-crosses, blazing shootouts, and nonstop action.

programme.title: Gunman from Bodie
programme.desc: Buck poses as a wanted killer and Sandy as a cook as the trio help ranchers stop a ruthless crook from taking over the area s water rights and help an orphaned baby.

programme.title: Local Love: Hopeless Romantic Searches for Fellow Swiftie

programme.title: Finding Adventure: City Girl’s Rapid Outdoor Initiation
